name: getText
description: Save arbitrary plaintext content (code, HTML, CSS, JSON, XML, TXT, Python, etc.) to disk and return a public URL. Use this to persist any text output — transcripts, generated code, structured data. Always saves a new file each call.

text.description: Plaintext content to write. Can be code, HTML, JSON, a transcript, etc.

filename.description: Optional base filename (with or without extension). Auto-generated if omitted.
